nodes.title: 拡散モデルを読み込む
01 - Front View (正面全身)
widgets_values: Show the character in a full body front view, facing directly toward the camera, neutral standing A-pose with arms slightly away from the body, full figure visible from head to toe, on a plain white background, no background elements, no scenery, no environment, clean white studio backdrop
